text:
>Please repocopy from math/R-cran-sm/files/bsd.cran.mk to Mk to place it
>used by many different CRAN ports and to preserve its history of CVS
>log messages.

If I understand the conventions correctly, this PR should be the
responsibility of portmgr, as wen@, tota@ and I are all in agreement
that the file should be placed in ports/Mk.
